docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLER, EDWARD

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-21-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Matthew Charleston Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per
Edward Miller and Rita Brown Defendants/Appellants in pro per

All parties and witnesses are sworn.

The Court takes a brief 15-minute recess to allow defendants to review exhibits previously submitted by plaintiff.

Mr. Charleston Plaintiff/Respondent testifies oh his own behalf.
Mr. Miller Defendant/Appellant does not cross examine Plaintiff.

Mr. Miller Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf.

Mr. Miller presents Exhibit 1: A spreadsheet

Mr. Charleston Plaintiff/Respondent
Mr. Charleston Plaintiff/Respondent states his rebuttal.

Plaintiff asks to be notified so that he may pick up his exhibits.
Defendant requests exhibits be destroyed.

At the conclusion of the Trial, The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (611).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Set For Trial On Jan-20-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Continued To Jan-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Judgment Entered
